bike_sharing_hourly.title: UCI Bike Sharing Dataset
bike_sharing_hourly.recommended_use: Small regression and walk-forward examples with hourly temporal folds.

bts_airline_2024_01.title: BTS Airline On-Time Performance, January 2024
bts_airline_2024_01.license: U.S. government public dataset; review BTS terms before redistribution.
bts_airline_2024_01.recommended_use: Ordinal delay-cost examples, dynamic retraining policies and notebook demos.

nyc_tlc_yellow_2024_01.title: NYC TLC Yellow Taxi Trip Records, January 2024
nyc_tlc_yellow_2024_01.license: NYC TLC public dataset; review provider terms before redistribution.
nyc_tlc_yellow_2024_01.recommended_use: Larger local performance and engine benchmarks with Parquet input.

household_power.title: UCI Individual Household Electric Power Consumption
household_power.license: UCI public dataset; review source terms before redistribution.
household_power.recommended_use: Minute-level temporal granularity, gaps and long-horizon planning examples.
